title: Reload systemd and commit memory fix

log.context: Reload systemd and commit memory fix

Both done.

- Daemon reloaded. Clunger is active and running with the new limit in effect: current memory usage 501.4M against a 2.0G max (was hitting OOM at the old 512M cap).
- Commit `91c5df0` pushed to `bigclungus/claude-config` master: `fix: clunger MemoryMax 512M→2G, remove MemorySwapMax (was causing OOM kills during congress)`.
